languages.text: "Максимально увеличил эффективность жизнеформ, участвующих в работе священного производственного блока на Кьяве Гамма. По благословению Омниссии был переведен в сан генетора и командирован на флагман. Результативность навыков установки аугментики была оценена предыдущим {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g} как выдающаяся".

traits.locale_text: "Максимально увеличил эффективность жизнеформ, учавствующих в работе священного производственного блока на Кьява Гамме. По благословению Омниссии был переведен в сан генетора и командирован на флагман. Результативность навыков установки аугментики была оценена предыдущим {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g} как выдающаяся".

languages.text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Максимально увеличил эффективность жизнеформ, участвующих в работе священного производственного блока на Кьяве Гамма. По благословению Омниссии был переведен в сан генетора и командирован на флагман. Результативность навыков установки аугментики была оценена предыдущим {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g} как выдающаяся".

traits.locale_text: "I maximized the efficiency of the lifeforms serving within the sacred production block on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmentics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

My proficiency in installing augmentics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

"I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

"I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

languages.text: “在基亚瓦伽马星的神圣制造工厂中，我最大限度地提升了服役生命体的工作效率。在欧姆尼赛亚的祝福下，我晋升为基因士，并被调派到这艘旗舰上。上一任{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}曾高度赞扬我安装植入物的精湛技艺。”
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “在基亚瓦伽马星的神圣制造工厂中，我最大限度地提升了服役生命体的工作效率。在欧姆尼赛亚的祝福下，我晋升为基因士，并被调派到这艘旗舰上。上一任{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}曾高度赞扬我安装植入物的精湛技艺。”

languages.text: «Maximicé la eficacia de las formas de vida que servían en el sagrado manufactorum de Kiava Gamma. Fui ascendido al rango de genetor por la gracia del Omnissiah y luego me asignaron a esta nave insignia. La anterior {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} elogió mi habilidad instalando aumentos calificándola de excepcional».
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Maximicé la eficacia de las formas de vida que servían en el sagrado manufactorum de Kiava Gamma. Fui ascendido al rango de genetor por la gracia del Omnissiah y luego me asignaron a esta nave insignia. La anterior {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} elogió mi habilidad instalando aumentos calificándola de excepcional».

languages.text: « J'ai maximisé l'efficacité des entités au service du manufactorum sacré de Kiava Gamma. Par la grâce de l'Omnimessie, j'ai atteint le rang de genetor et j'ai été envoyé sur ce vaisseau amiral. Ma maîtrise de l'installation d'augmétiques a été qualifiée d'exceptionnelle par la précédente {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchande{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai maximisé l'efficacité des entités au service du manufactorum sacré de Kiava Gamma. Par la grâce de l'Omnimessie, j'ai atteint le rang de genetor et j'ai été envoyé sur ce vaisseau amiral. Ma maîtrise de l'installation d'augmétiques a été qualifiée d'exceptionnelle par la précédente {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchande{/g}. »

languages.text: "Ich habe die Effizienz der Lebensformen maximiert, die im heiligen Manufactorum auf Kiava Gamma dienen. Mit dem Segen des Omnissiah stieg ich in den Rang eines Genetors auf und wurde auf dieses Flaggschiff verlegt. Mein Sachverstand hinsichtlich der Installation von Augmentationen wurde von der letzten {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändlerin{/g} als außergewöhnlich geschätzt."
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe die Effizienz der Lebensformen maximiert, die im heiligen Manufactorum auf Kiava Gamma dienen. Mit dem Segen des Omnissiah stieg ich in den Rang eines Genetors auf und wurde auf dieses Flaggschiff verlegt. Mein Sachverstand hinsichtlich der Installation von Augmentationen wurde von der letzten {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändlerin{/g} als außergewöhnlich geschätzt."

languages.text: "Kiava Gama'daki kutsal manufaktorumda hizmet veren yaşam formlarının verimliliğini en üst düzeye çıkardım. Hermesih'in lütfuyla Genetör mevkisine yükseldim ve bu sancak gemisine konuşlandırıldım. Ogmetik kurma konusundaki yeterliliğim, bir önceki {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} tarafından olağanüstü olarak değerlendirilmişti."
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Kiava Gama'daki kutsal manufaktorumda hizmet veren yaşam formlarının verimliliğini en üst düzeye çıkardım. Hermesih'in lütfuyla Genetör mevkisine yükseldim ve bu sancak gemisine konuşlandırıldım. Ogmetik kurma konusundaki yeterliliğim, bir önceki {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} tarafından olağanüstü olarak değerlendirilmişti."

languages.text: 「キアヴァ・ガンマの聖なる製造所内で働く生命体の効率を最大化しました。オムニシアの祝福により、私はジェネターのランクに昇格し、この旗艦に配属されました。私の増幅器の設置スキルは、前の{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}によって非常に高いと評価されました。」
languages.original_text: "I maximised the efficiency of the life forms serving within the sacred manufactorum on Kiava Gamma. By the blessing of the Omnissiah, I ascended to Genetor rank and was deployed to this flagship. My proficiency in installing augmetics was appraised as exceptional by the previous {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: 「キアヴァ・ガンマの聖なる製造所内で働く生命体の効率を最大化しました。オムニシアの祝福により、私はジェネターのランクに昇格し、この旗艦に配属されました。私の増幅器の設置スキルは、前の{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}によって非常に高いと評価されました。」
